title: Teacher and leader development: ECF and NPQs 2024 to 2025
body: "This release provides information on the number of early career teachers (ECTs) participating in the early career framework (ECF) and the number of teachers and leaders participating in reformed national professional qualifications (NPQs).  It includes numbers of starts in the academic year 2024 to 2025.  Previous releases are available:   Teacher and leader development: ECF and NPQs 2023 to 2024 Teacher and leader development: ECF and NPQs 2022 to 2023 Teacher and leader development: ECF and NPQs 2021 to 2022   "
